tracks.title: 🇲🇳 Steppe Eternal — Mongolian Throat Singing Khoomei | Монгол Хөөмий — Assirem Music PROD
tracks.description:
The vast Mongolian steppe speaks through Khoomei — the ancient art of throat singing.

Inscribed on the UNESCO Intangible Cultural Heritage list in 2009, Khoomei (Хөөмий) is a form of singing where a single performer produces multiple harmonics simultaneously, creating an otherworldly resonance that echoes across the endless grasslands.

Featuring the morin khuur (horsehead fiddle), this track honors the nomadic heritage of the Mongol people.

Монгол нутгийн уудам тал, хөөмийн урлаг, морин хуурын аялгуу — энэ бүхэн нэг дуунд.

⏱️ Chapters:
00:00 — Dawn on the Steppe
01:20 — Khoomei Rising
02:40 — Horsehead Fiddle
03:50 — Eternal Horizon

🎧 Perfect for: meditation, world music discovery, cultural exploration

#Mongolia #KhoomeiThroatSinging #MorinKhuur #WorldMusic #UNESCO #AIMusic #AssiremMusicProd #NoCopyright #Steppe #TraditionalMusic
